titleStmt.title: SII 28.165: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 165. (A.R. No. 320 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records an order of Vīrapāṇḍiya-Vāṇādhirāyaṉ to be taken note of, by the authorities of the temple of Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār, with regard to an extent of 10(3/4) vēli (equated to 43 mā) of land granted as tiruvōḍai and tiruvōḍai-ppuṟam (channel gardens for growing flowers for the temple as also for paying the maintenance of those tending the channel garden). The order directed that this land would be shown in the accounts as tirunāmattukkāṇi that was, tax free as arranged by ūr (ūr-kīḻ-iṟai-ili). The said land had been granted by Malaiyaṅ-kiḻāṉ Maṉṟikkuṉikkum Perumān alias Dīpattariayaṉ. The land concerned was in Chōḻakulavallinallūr and on being granted as above was separated from the paṟṟu of that village and constituted into a distinct bloc named as Śivakāmasuṉdarinallūr and attached to the dēvadāna-ppaṟṟu. The garden concerned was to supply flowers for tirukkai-muḻuppū, tiruv-aḍippoṭṭu and tirumālai-ttoṅgal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ḥ komāṟappaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu 100 ṉāl virapāṇṭiya vāṇādhirāyaṉ Olai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyār koyil kaṇkāṇi karaṇattārka
ḷum varippottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum tirukkaikoṭṭi paṇṭārattārum kaṇṭu viṭutaṉtatāvatu coḻakulavalli nallūril malaiyaṅkiḻāṉ maṉṟikkuṉikkum perumānāṉa tīpattaraiyaṉ tiruvoṭaiyum
tiruvoṭaippuṟamum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭu Ivar Eḻutiṉa cātaṉamum Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyumāka Ivvūruravar Eḻutiṉa niyokamum tirukkai Oṭṭi paṇṭāratte Oṭukkuvittuk ko
ṇṭu muṉpu kalveṭṭiṉa nilam patte mukkāliṉāl nilam nāṟpattu muṉṟu māvum tevatāṉamāka Iṭṭu coḻakulavallip paṟṟiṉiṉṟum kaḻittu civakāmacuṉtarinallūreṉṉum perāl
veṟu piṟittu tevatāṉap paṟṟuṭaṉe kūṭṭi tirunāmattukkāṇit tiruvoṭaippuṟamumāka Oṉpatāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟu Aṟupattu Āṟiṉāl brasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tiru
mukappaṭiye Iṉṉāḷ mutal Iṉṉilam Ivvūrp paṟṟiṉiṉṟum kaḻittut tevatāṉamāka mutal koṇṭu tevatāṉap paṟṟuṭaṉe kūṭṭit tirunāmattukkāṇi tiruoṭaippuṟamumākavu
m Ippaṭi ceyyumiṭattu muṉpu Ūrkiḻiṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nāḷil koyilukkum periyanācciyār koyilukkum palanāyaṉmārkkum Eṇṇuvatāka niccayittu vaṭakkil tiruoṭaikuṭi
makkaḷil kaṭakka vināyakappiccaṉum comaṉāta tevappiccanum tirucciṟṟampalapiccaṉum k(ā)ṇkāṇiyākakkoṇṭu Eṇṇappotum tirukkai muḻuppūvum tiruvaṭippoṭṭum tirumā(l)lai tiruttoṅkal
Uḷpaṭa nittappaṭi niccayittu Āṭṭaikku Eṇṇuvatāka muṉpu tirumāḷikaiyil kalveṭṭina tiruppaḷḷitāmam Aiñcu nūṟāirattu Oru patiṉāyiramum Uḷpaṭṭa tirumukappaṭi Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa
nāḷmutal Ivar Eṇṇuvippatāka niccayitta Iṉnilam nāṟpattu muṉṟumāvil tirukai muḻuppūvum tiruvaṭippoṭṭukkum nāḷ Oṉṟukku Orumā� nūṟṟu Eḻupatukkup perumpaṟṟappu
liyū(r)ril tiruoṭai koṇṭuviṭṭa nilam Orumāvukku koṟṟukku Uṭa(l)lāka muṉpu kalveṭṭiṉa nilam nālumāvum nikki nilam muppattu Oṉpatumāvukku tirumālai tirutoṅkal �dhināyanā
yammarkku Eṇṇum tirupaḷḷittāmam Uḷpaṭa nilam Orumāvukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eṇṇum tiruppaḷḷitāmam Aṟupattāṟāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruppaḷḷittāmam Iraṇṭāyirattu Aiññūṟṟu
Eḻupattunālu nāḷ Oṉṟukkup pū Iraṇṭāirattu Eḻunūṟṟu nāṟpattu nāllāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟu AṟṟupaThe stone containing the letters put within brackets here and marked 1 has been built adjcent to the stone containing the letters ending with the letter marked 2.ttaiñcukku EṇṇumRead toḷāyirattañtirupaḷḷittāmam pattunūṟāyirattu torāyiratañ
ñūṟṟu tum Eṇṇavum Eṇṇumiṭattu Inta tiruoṭai neṭuniḷamākaiyil tirukkai muḻuppū tiThe stone containing the letters put within brackets here and marked 1 has been built adjcent to the stone containing the letters ending with the letter marked 2.ruvaṭi poṭṭuruttapaṭi Eṇṇavum nikki niṟṟa pūvile kulottuṅka co[ ḷiśvara]
muṭaiyārkku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aimpatu tirupaḷḷitāmam Eṇṇavum nikki niṉṟa tirupaḷḷitāmattil natapaṭi EṇalāvaThe stone containing the letters put within brackets here and marked 1 has been built adjcent to the stone containing the letters ending with the letter marked 2.tu Eṇṇi taravāku tirupaḷḷitāmam Āṇṭā caṟuti tāḻuvaṟaveṇṇavum ṅ
niṟkiḻaṅku tiruttoppil muta mutal muṉppitai kalveṭṭippaṭiye paṇṭāraṅkatoṟum mutal yiṭavum Ippaṭikku [ cantr] Ātitavaṉ celvatāka prasātam ceytaruḷiṉa tirumuka
m paṇṭārattu Oṭukkuvittukkoṇṭu Irājākkaḷ tampirāṉ tirumā(ḷ)ḷikaiyil muṉpu kalveṭṭiṉa Iṭattukku vaṭaRead toḷāyirattañkkākak kalveṭṭuvikkavum paṇṇuvate § Ivai
vīrapāṇṭiya vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Itu coḻakulavalli nallūr milaiyaṅkiḻāṉRead malaiyaṅkiḻāṉ •maṉṟilkuṉikkum perumāḷāṉa tīpattaraiyaṉ viṭṭa tiruoṭai tirutoppu §
Digital edition of SII 28.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
